announcement.text: Inside Cetakia: New AI-assisted estimation workflow for printing teams

footer.description: Platform ERP profesional untuk bisnis percetakan yang membutuhkan kejelasan, kecepatan, dan kontrol operasional yang skalabel.

hero.description: Cetakia menyatukan pemasaran, penjualan, produksi, inventaris, akuntansi, dan pelaporan ke dalam satu sistem operasional terintegrasi yang dibangun untuk efisiensi, kecepatan, konsistensi, dan pertumbuhan.

features.title: Dibangun untuk bisnis percetakan end-to-end
features.description: Setiap tim bekerja di atas fondasi data yang sama, mulai dari perencanaan komersial hingga output produksi dan keuangan.

items.title: Penjualan ke Kas
items.description: Kelola penawaran, sales order, invoice, dan penerimaan pelanggan dalam satu alur yang andal.

items.title: Koordinasi Pengiriman
items.description: Kontrol jadwal pengiriman, progres dispatch, dan bukti pengiriman dengan akuntabilitas yang jelas.

items.title: Kontrol Pembelian
items.description: Kelola permintaan pembelian, purchase order, dan transaksi vendor dengan visibilitas penuh.

items.title: Pekerjaan Produksi
items.description: Jalankan pekerjaan in-house, antar divisi, dan outsourcing dengan pelacakan status yang presisi.

items.title: Integritas Master Data
items.description: Jaga data pelanggan, produk, komponen, satuan, dan vendor tetap selaras untuk operasi yang bersih dan akurat.

items.title: Kesiapan Akuntansi
items.description: Susun chart of accounts dan pantau posisi keuangan dengan rekam transaksi yang mudah ditelusuri.

items.title: Laporan Eksekutif
items.description: Akses insight penjualan, penerimaan, inventaris, dan profitabilitas untuk mendukung keputusan strategis.

items.title: Lapisan Intelijen
items.description: Manfaatkan Expert System dan Business Intelligence untuk perencanaan yang lebih cerdas dan pertumbuhan performa.

workflow.title: Hubungkan setiap tahap tanpa silo operasional
workflow.description: Cetakia membantu tim mengeksekusi pekerjaan secara efisien dengan transisi yang jelas antara komersial, produksi, pengiriman, dan penutupan keuangan.

steps.title: Tangkap Permintaan
steps.description: Buat penawaran dan ubah menjadi sales order dengan jejak data yang lengkap.

steps.title: Rencanakan dan Produksi
steps.description: Arahkan pekerjaan ke in-house, divisi, atau outsourcing dengan tata kelola status.

steps.title: Kirim dengan Kontrol
steps.description: Koordinasikan jadwal pengiriman dan jaga kualitas komunikasi pelanggan.

steps.title: Tutup Siklus Keuangan
steps.description: Terbitkan invoice, pantau penerimaan, dan tampilkan insight bisnis secara real-time.

outcomes.title: Hasil nyata dari tim yang menjalankan Cetakia setiap hari
outcomes.description: Dengarkan bagaimana tim penjualan, produksi, pengiriman, dan keuangan memperoleh koordinasi lebih cepat melalui satu platform terhubung.

testimonials.quote: Cetakia merapikan siklus penawaran hingga invoice dan mengurangi hambatan follow-up antar tim.
testimonials.name: Rina Hartono

testimonials.quote: Kami kini memantau pekerjaan in-house, divisi, dan outsourcing dari satu dashboard tanpa kehilangan kontrol.
testimonials.name: Arief Nugraha

testimonials.quote: Koordinasi pengiriman menjadi lebih cepat karena semua orang memakai referensi status dan jadwal yang sama.
testimonials.name: Maya Prasetyo

pricing.title: Paket fleksibel untuk setiap tahap bisnis Anda
pricing.description: Mulai dari workflow esensial, lalu tingkatkan ke otomasi dan tata kelola yang lebih dalam seiring bertambahnya kompleksitas.

plans.name: Free Starter
plans.description: Ideal untuk tim tahap awal yang memvalidasi workflow inti.

plans.name: Basic
plans.description: Untuk operasi kecil yang membutuhkan kontrol proses lebih rapi.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: Untuk tim berkembang yang membutuhkan kecepatan, visibilitas, dan skala.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: Untuk bisnis dengan kebutuhan tata kelola lanjutan.

plans.name: Custom
plans.description: Disesuaikan untuk operasi kompleks dengan kebutuhan spesifik.

contact.title: Modernisasi sistem percetakan Anda dengan satu platform terpadu
contact.description: Mulai bangun operasi yang lebih cepat, bersih, dan mudah diprediksi bersama Cetakia.

items.title: Apakah tersedia free trial?
items.content: Ya. Anda bisa mulai dari paket Free Starter, lalu upgrade saat tim membutuhkan lebih banyak pengguna dan laporan yang lebih dalam.

items.title: Apakah saya bisa mengubah paket nanti?
items.content: Bisa. Anda dapat berpindah paket seiring pertumbuhan volume produksi, tanpa mengorbankan kontinuitas data.

items.title: Bagaimana sistem tagihan dan pembatalan bekerja?
items.content: Tagihan dapat dilakukan bulanan atau tahunan sesuai siklus yang dipilih. Pembatalan dapat diajukan sebelum siklus berikutnya dimulai.

items.title: Apakah tersedia dukungan onboarding dan implementasi?
items.content: Ya. Tim kami dapat membantu setup, pemetaan proses, dan onboarding untuk workflow sales, produksi, gudang, dan finance.

items.title: Apakah Cetakia bisa terintegrasi dengan tools yang sudah kami gunakan?
items.content: Ya. Untuk skenario lanjutan, paket Enterprise dan Custom mendukung integrasi serta penyelarasan otomasi berdasarkan kebutuhan Anda.

items.title: Bagaimana mekanisme dukungan bekerja?
items.content: Tingkat dukungan bergantung pada paket Anda. Basic mencakup dukungan online, sedangkan Pro dan di atasnya mendapatkan bantuan prioritas yang lebih cepat.

announcement.text: Inside Cetakia: New AI-assisted estimation workflow for printing teams

footer.description: A professional ERP platform for printing businesses that need clarity, speed, and scalable control.

hero.description: Cetakia unifies marketing, sales, production, inventory, accounting, and reporting into one integrated operating system built for efficiency, speed, consistency, and scalable business growth.

features.title: Built for end-to-end print business
features.description: Every team works on the same data foundation, from commercial planning to production output and finance.

items.title: Sales to Cash
items.description: Handle quotations, sales orders, invoices, and customer receipts in one reliable flow.

items.title: Delivery Coordination
items.description: Control delivery schedules, dispatch progress, and proof of delivery with clear accountability.

items.title: Purchase Control
items.description: Manage purchase requests, purchase orders, and vendor transactions with full visibility.

items.title: Production Jobs
items.description: Run in-house, inter-division, and outsourcing jobs with status tracking and operational precision.

items.title: Master Data Integrity
items.description: Keep customers, products, components, units, and vendors aligned for clean and accurate operations.

items.title: Accounting Readiness
items.description: Structure chart of accounts and monitor financial positions with traceable transaction records.

items.title: Executive Reporting
items.description: Access sales, receipt, inventory, and profitability insights to support strategic decisions.

items.title: Intelligence Layer
items.description: Leverage Expert System and Business Intelligence for smarter planning and performance growth.

workflow.title: Keep every stage connected without operational silos
workflow.description: Cetakia helps teams execute with flawless efficiency by creating clear transitions between commercial, production, delivery, and financial closure.

steps.title: Capture Demand
steps.description: Generate quotation and convert to sales order with full traceability.

steps.title: Plan & Produce
steps.description: Route jobs across in-house, divisions, or outsourcing with status governance.

steps.title: Deliver with Control
steps.description: Coordinate delivery schedules and maintain customer communication quality.

steps.title: Close Financial Loop
steps.description: Issue invoices, monitor receipts, and expose business insights in real time.

outcomes.title: Proven results from teams running Cetakia every day
outcomes.description: Hear how sales, production, delivery, and finance teams gain faster coordination with one connected platform.

testimonials.quote: Cetakia streamlined our quotation-to-invoice cycle and reduced follow-up bottlenecks between teams.
testimonials.name: Rina Hartono

testimonials.quote: We now monitor in-house, division, and outsourcing jobs from one dashboard without losing control.
testimonials.name: Arief Nugraha

testimonials.quote: Delivery coordination is faster because everyone works on the same status and schedule reference.
testimonials.name: Maya Prasetyo

pricing.title: Flexible plans to match every stage of your business
pricing.description: Start with essential workflows, then scale into deeper automation and governance as complexity grows.

plans.name: Free Starter
plans.description: Ideal for early-stage teams validating core workflows.

plans.name: Basic
plans.description: For small operations that need tighter process control.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For growing teams requiring speed, visibility, and scale.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For business with advanced governance needs.

plans.name: Custom
plans.description: Tailored for complex operations with specific requirements.

contact.title: Modernize your printing system with one cohesive platform
contact.description: Start building a faster, cleaner, and more predictable operation with Cetakia.

items.title: Is there a free trial available?
items.content: Yes. You can start from the Free Starter plan, then upgrade when your team needs more users and deeper reporting.

items.title: Can I change my plan later?
items.content: Absolutely. You can move between plans as your production volume grows, while keeping data continuity intact.

items.title: How does billing and cancellation work?
items.content: Billing can be monthly or annual based on your selected cycle. You can request cancellation before the next cycle starts.

items.title: Do you provide onboarding and implementation support?
items.content: Yes. Our team can assist setup, process mapping, and onboarding for sales, production, warehouse, and finance workflows.

items.title: Can Cetakia integrate with our existing tools?
items.content: Yes. For advanced scenarios, the Enterprise and Custom plans support integration and automation alignment based on your requirements.

items.title: How does support work?
items.content: Support level depends on your plan. Basic includes online support, while Pro and above include faster priority assistance.
